trivia_bullets.text: Malevolent Chandelier is a common Artifact Creature -- Construct from Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK), released September 27, 2024. The set's design brief called for household objects turned hostile; Malevolent Chandelier is a literal expression of that premise.

Flavor text: "If you see a light moving toward you in the darkness, don't assume it's coming to help." -- Winter. Winter is a human survivor of Duskmourn who entered the House as a teenager over a decade before the story's present. He guides Niko Aris and the Wanderer, but ultimately betrays them -- sacrificing his companions to Valgavoth in exchange for his own escape to Innistrad.
A 4/4 flying Construct for {6} with repeatable {2} sorcery-speed graveyard removal (bottom of library). Legal in Pauper where dedicated common graveyard-hate creatures are limited.

EDHREC rank 18,598 -- among the least-played of the five cards in this batch in Commander. High mana cost likely limits it to thematic Duskmourn-tribal builds rather than competitive graveyard-hate slots.

related_cards.name: Winter, Misanthropic Guide
related_cards.note: the flavor-text speaker; a Duskmourn survivor and traitor character

related_cards.name: Creeping Chill
